questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "beautiful"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "modern"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "ancient"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "quality"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "least"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "equally"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "nearly"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "largest"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "heavier"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "lighter"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "rank"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "compare"?
Choose the best word: Both are _____ good.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Both are equally good." — từ đúng là "equally" (ngang nhau).

questions.question: Choose the best word: It is _____ as big as mine.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "It is nearly as big as mine." — từ đúng là "nearly" (gần như).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Russia is the _____ country.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Russia is the largest country." — từ đúng là "largest" (lớn nhất).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Lead is _____ than wood.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Lead is heavier than wood." — từ đúng là "heavier" (nặng hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Plastic is _____ than metal.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Plastic is lighter than metal." — từ đúng là "lighter" (nhẹ hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: We _____ the teams by points.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "We rank the teams by points." — từ đúng là "rank" (xếp hạng).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Let's _____ the two phones.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Let's compare the two phones." — từ đúng là "compare" (so sánh).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The _____ was useful.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The comparison was useful." — từ đúng là "comparison" (sự so sánh).

questions.question: Choose the best word: An elephant is _____ than a dog.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "An elephant is bigger than a dog." — từ đúng là "bigger" (to hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: A mouse is _____ than a cat.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "A mouse is smaller than a cat." — từ đúng là "smaller" (nhỏ hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This plan is _____ than that one.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This plan is better than that one." — từ đúng là "better" (tốt hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Traffic is _____ on Mondays.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Traffic is worse on Mondays." — từ đúng là "worse" (tệ hơn).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: An elephant is ___ than a dog.
Complete the sentence: This is the ___ film I've ever seen.
Complete the sentence: Maths is ___ than English for me.
Complete the sentence: She is the ___ student in class.
Complete the sentence: Today is ___ than yesterday.
questions.explanation: Short adjective comparative doubles the consonant.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: A car is ___ expensive than a bike.
questions.explanation: Use 'more' for comparative of long adjectives.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: This is the ___ book in the shop.
Complete the sentence: My bag is ___ as yours.
Complete the sentence: Traffic is ___ on Mondays.
Complete the sentence: Russia is the ___ country in the world.
Which English word means "đẹp"?
Which English word means "hiện đại"?
Which English word means "cổ xưa"?
Which English word means "chất lượng"?
Which English word means "ít nhất"?
Which English word means "ngang nhau"?
